name: Create a Curated PyPI repository for AI packages
name_cn: 创建 Curated PyPI 仓库用于 AI 包管理

name: Install AI packages through Artifactory Curation
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory Curation 安装 AI 依赖包
hint: cd modules/curation-ai/sample-project, configure pip to use your virtual repo, then run: pip install -r requirements.txt -i <JFROG_URL>/artifactory/api/pypi/<NICKNAME>-pypi-ai-virtual/simple
hint_cn: 进入 modules/curation-ai/sample-project，配置 pip 指向虚拟仓库后安装依赖

name: Create a Curation Policy for AI packages
name_cn: 为 AI 包创建 Curation 策略
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Policies → New Policy (name must contain your nickname, apply to your PyPI remote repo)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Policies → New Policy（名称必须含昵称，应用到你的 PyPI remote 仓库）

name: Block a vulnerable AI package version
name_cn: 阻断一个存在漏洞的 AI 包版本
hint: Configure a Curation rule to block packages with High/Critical CVEs, then attempt to install a vulnerable version like: pip install torch==1.12.0 -i ...
hint_cn: 配置阻断高危 CVE 的规则后，尝试安装含漏洞的旧版包，验证 Curation 阻断生效

name: Review AI package governance in Curation Audit
name_cn: 在 Curation Audit 中查看 AI 包治理记录
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Audit, explore the audit trail for your AI package install and block attempts
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Audit，查看 AI 包安装和阻断的完整审计记录
